storylines.title: Hyperliquid ETF Race Accelerates as HYPE Surges 200%
storylines.summary: FACT: Bitwise filed an updated S-1 for a Hyperliquid ETF on 2026-04-11, joining Grayscale, 21Shares, and VanEck in the race. FACT: HYPE has surged around 200% over the last 12 months according to CoinDesk.

sources.title: Bitwise files updated S-1 for Hyperliquid ETF as HYPE fund race heats up

polymarket.question: What price will Bitcoin hit in April?

storylines.title: SEC and CFTC Signal Regulatory Clarity for Crypto
storylines.summary: FACT: The SEC issued an interpretation on 2026-03-17 clarifying how federal securities laws apply to certain crypto assets. FACT: The SEC and CFTC announced a historic MOU on 2026-03-11 to guide coordination and support lawful innovation.

sources.title: SEC Clarifies the Application of Federal Securities Laws to Crypto Assets
SEC and CFTC Announce Historic Memorandum of Understanding Between Agencies

polymarket.question: Who will be confirmed as Fed Chair?

storylines.title: Trafigura Deploys $65M in Ghana Gold Trade Finance
storylines.summary: FACT: Trafigura signed a gold offtake agreement and provided debt financing for the Bogoso-Prestea mine in Ghana on 2026-04-09. FACT: The deal involves $65M in financing according to multiple sources including Bloomberg and Reuters.

sources.title: Trafigura's Ghana Gold Mine Deal: $65M Financing & Offtake for Bogoso-Prestea - News and Statistics - IndexBox
Trafigura Signs Offtake, Financing Deal With Ghanaian Gold Miner - Bloomberg.com
Trafigura enters Ghana gold sector with Bogoso-Prestea deal - Reuters
Trafigura signs gold offtake agreement and provides debt financing for Bogoso–Prestea mine in Ghana - Trafigura

polymarket.question: What will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit in April 2026?

storylines.title: Circle Faces Stablecoin Yield Regulation Pressure
storylines.summary: FACT: Circle posted its worst day on record on 2026-03-24 as proposed law could limit stablecoin yield according to CNBC. FACT: Circle clarified its USDC freeze policy on 2026-04-10 after a Drift exploit and urged passage of GENIUS and CLARITY Acts.

sources.title: Circle posts worst day on record as proposed law could limit stablecoin yield - CNBC
Circle clarifies USDC freeze policy after Drift exploit, urges passage of GENIUS and CLARITY Acts - Crypto Briefing
